title: Brick Pyramid Infdev - UpPort
description: Bring back one of Minecraft’s strangest and most nostalgic structures — the Infdev Brick Pyramid!
body:
**📜 About:**

In the very early days of Minecraft (Infdev 2010), brick pyramid would randomly generate in the world.
They didn’t have loot, they didn’t have purpose — they were simply Notch’s test structures for world generation.

This mod faithfully re-adds them into modern Minecraft!

 

**📦 Why Add It?**

Because it’s history! The Brick Pyramid is one of the strangest relics from Minecraft’s development, long removed but never forgotten. Now you can bring it back to your survival worlds and watch your friends ask:

“Why is there a giant pyramid made of bricks here?”

The huge pyramid is in development and will be released as a addon!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![old bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e8522c79ff6100858e967965a7f3f68b68ad28.png)
**🔍 OLD BRICK STYLE IS BACK!**
